# Central Park Delphine

> Central Park Delphine (also known as Central Park The Delphine or Delphine Central Park Estates) is a ~10.25-acre luxury residential project by Central Park Group in Sector 104, Dwarka Expressway, Gurugram, Haryana, India. The project offers approximately 1,604 residences across 6 high-rise towers with Studios, 1 BHK, 3 BHK and 4 BHK configurations. The luxury tower component (Towers B, C, D) spans 7.85 acres with ~219 units. Starting ₹3 Crore onwards. Possession April 2031. RERA registered.

## Key Facts

- **Project name**: Central Park Delphine (Central Park The Delphine / Delphine Central Park Estates)
- **Developer**: Central Park Group
- **Location**: Sector 104, Dwarka Expressway, Gurugram, Haryana, India
- **Total project area**: ~10.25 acres (Towers B, C, D: 7.85 acres; Tower A: ~2.5 acres)
- **Total residences**: ~1,604 (all types); luxury 3/4 BHK component: ~219 units
- **Towers**: 6 high-rise residential towers
  - Tower A: 2 serviced apartment towers (G+16 & G+27)
  - Towers B, C, D: 3 luxury residential towers (Stilt + 36 floors + 2 service floors + 3-level basement)
- **Configurations**:
  - Studios: 981-1,027 sq ft (Tower A)
  - 1 BHK: 1,375-1,643 sq ft (Tower A)
  - 3 BHK: 4,242-4,281 sq ft (Towers B, C, D)
  - 4 BHK: ~5,559 sq ft (Towers B, C, D)
- **Starting price**: ₹3 Crore onwards*
- **Payment plan**: 36:64 (36% at booking, 64% on possession) OR CLP milestone
- **Possession**: April 2031
- **RERA numbers**:
  - RC/REP/HARERA/GGM/996/728/2025/99
  - RC/REP/HARERA/GGM/997/729/2025/100
  - RC/REP/HARERA/GGM/998/730/2025/101
- **RERA authority**: Haryana Real Estate Regulatory Authority (HRERA)
- **Clubhouse**: 300,000 sq ft
- **Contact**: +91 94122 34688
- **Official site**: https://centralparkdelphine.info/

## Location & Connectivity

- IGI Airport, New Delhi: ~30 minutes drive
- Cyber City, Gurugram: ~15 minutes drive
- NH-48 (Delhi-Jaipur Expressway): ~15 minutes drive
- Nearest Railway Station: ~5-10 minutes drive
- Dwarka Expressway: 250 metres

## Amenities

Sky deck infinity pool, 300,000 sq ft clubhouse, mini theatre, tennis court, yoga pavilion, rooftop skywalk, 1-acre Skywalk Cafe, 5-tier security, home automation, landscaped gardens, sports courts, kids play area, gym, swimming pool, jogging track, water mist cooling, vehicle-free community.

## Residence Specifications

- **Studios (981-1,027 sq ft)**: Compact luxury serviced apartments in Tower A, ideal for professionals and investors, with modern finishes.
- **1 BHK (1,375-1,643 sq ft)**: Spacious serviced apartments in Tower A with premium interiors and full-service amenities.
- **3 BHK (4,242-4,281 sq ft)**: Luxury family residences in Towers B, C, D with premium interiors, multiple balconies, and modern amenities.
- **4 BHK (~5,559 sq ft)**: Ultra-luxury residences in Towers B, C, D with expansive living spaces, premium finishes, and panoramic views.

## About Central Park Group

Central Park Group is a leading Gurugram real estate developer known for premium residential projects. Their portfolio includes Central Park Flower Valley (500 acres, Sectors 32-33), Central Park Sky Villas (Sector 48, ultra-luxury), and Central Park Resorts (47.5 acres, Sector 48, resort-style living). The group has been recognized with Foxglove Awards, Golden Brick Awards, and IBE Awards.

## Disclaimer

Information is indicative and subject to change. Prices, sizes and specifications should be verified directly with the developer and on the HRERA portal (haryanarera.gov.in) before booking.
